underlying_goal: Brainstorm and design a Day Builder feature, mobile strategy, codebase cleanup plan, and dashboard/settings architecture for their Travel Planner app, then commit the design doc
friction_detail: iCloud Drive sync issues corrupted the git index and evicted pack files, preventing the design doc from being committed despite multiple recovery attempts.
brief_summary: User wanted to brainstorm and formalize a Day Builder design with mobile strategy and cleanup plan; the design was collaboratively approved across 6 sections but git/iCloud corruption prevented committing the final doc.
